loading.title: Loading Your Chart
loading.subtitle: Please wait while we retrieve your birth chart...

error.title: Unable to Load Chart
error.body: We couldn't load your chart data. This might be a temporary connection issue.

cta.title: Connect an AI model to generate your interpretation
cta.body: Your chart is calculated on-device. To turn it into a personalized reading, connect an AI model — use the one-click OpenRouter preset or point AlmaMesh at a local model (e.g. Ollama).

generation.elapsed: Generating from your model — {{elapsed}} elapsed. A full reading can take 1–3 minutes on a cloud model.
generation.model_unavailable: The AI model in your settings isn't available on your endpoint — so the reading couldn't be generated. Switch to the recommended model and try again.
generation.partial_failure: Some sections could not be generated this time: {{sections}}. The rest of the reading is complete — regenerate to fill the gap.

chat.not_configured_notice: Connect an AI model to ask questions about your chart — open Settings → AI Model (or the AI badge in the header) and use the one-click OpenRouter preset, or point AlmaMesh at a local model (e.g. Ollama at http://localhost:11434/v1).

chart_visualization.empty_body: Please generate your birth chart to view the technical analysis.
